SEARCH
Module storm.test
Package st.orm.test

Annotation Interface StormTest

@Target(TYPE) @Retention(RUNTIME) @ExtendWith(StormExtension.class) public @interface StormTest
Annotation for Storm integration tests.

Provides automatic DataSource creation using an H2 in-memory database (by default), SQL script execution, and parameter injection for test methods. Test methods can declare parameters of type DataSource, StatementCapture, or any type with a static of(DataSource) factory method (such as ORMTemplate).

Example usage:


 @StormTest(scripts = {"/schema.sql", "/data.sql"})
 class MyTest {

     @Test
     void myTest(ORMTemplate orm) {
         // orm is ready to use
     }
 }
Since:
1.9

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    String
    password
    Database password.
    String[]
    scripts
    Classpath SQL scripts to execute before tests run.
    String
    url
    JDBC URL for the test database.
    String
    username
    Database username.

  • Element Details

    • scripts

      String[] scripts
      Classpath SQL scripts to execute before tests run. Scripts are executed once per test class.
      Default:
      {}

    • url

      String url
      JDBC URL for the test database. Defaults to an H2 in-memory database with a unique name per test class.
      Default:
      ""

    • username

      String username
      Database username. Defaults to "sa".
      Default:
      "sa"

    • password

      String password
      Database password. Defaults to an empty string.
      Default:
      ""
